---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a new capability or workflow
title: '[FEATURE] '
labels: enhancement
---

## Motivation

Why is this needed? What problem does it solve?

## Proposed behavior

What should PRAE do? Be specific about which tool, command, or artifact is involved.

## Alternatives considered

Other approaches you've thought about and why this one is preferable.

## Methodology fit

How does this fit the two-track / four-phase / four-gate model? (This helps reviewers decide whether it belongs in core or as an extension.)
